Friendly Boston Roofing Experts

Leading the Charge to Protect Your Home

Trusted by homeowners across Boston for quality roofing, storm damage repair, and exterior services. We deliver results backed by industry-leading certifications.

Family Owned & Operated GAF Master Elite Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Request a Free Inspection

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
J
James T.

Heritage replaced our 1920s slate roof in Back Bay with synthetic slate that looks identical but performs much better. They handled all the historic commission paperwork and completed the job with zero damage to our ornate cornices. Six nor'easters later, not a single leak.

L
Lisa M.

When a tree limb punctured our roof during a Newton snowstorm, Heritage had a team out within hours to tarp the damage. Their insurance documentation was so thorough we had our claim approved in 48 hours. The repair blends perfectly with our Tudor's original roof.

D
David R.

Our Cambridge Victorian finally has gutters that don't overflow during heavy rains. Heritage replicated the original half-round profile in copper that matches our historic details. They even added hidden heating cables that have eliminated our ice dam problems completely.

S
Sarah K.

Heritage installed a new EPDM roof on our Quincy seafood restaurant with minimal disruption to our busy kitchen. The specialized flashing handles salt spray better than our old roof, and their quarterly maintenance program catches small issues before they become problems.

More Home Exterior Services

Roof Replacement Storm Damage Repair Gutter Installation Roof Inspection

We're GAF Master Elite Certified!

Only 2% of roofing contractors in North America hold this prestigious certification. It means superior workmanship, manufacturer-backed warranties, and unmatched quality on every project.

More About Us →

The Heritage Roof Masters Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Inspection

We start with a thorough, no-obligation inspection of your roof and exterior. Our certified team identifies damage, wear, and potential issues — then provides a detailed report with photos and recommendations.

2

Choose Your Product

Browse our curated selection of premium materials from industry-leading manufacturers. Our experts help you find the perfect combination of durability, aesthetics, and budget for your home.

3

Let's Build

Our skilled crews get to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, safe job site and keep you informed every step of the way — from tear-off to final installation.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our project managers perform a comprehensive quality inspection. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards and manufacturer specifications.

5

Final Invoice

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We also assist with insurance claims and financing options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Boston & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve homeowners throughout Boston, MA and the surrounding communities. Our team knows the local building codes, weather patterns, and what your home needs to stay protected year-round.

Cambridge Newton Brookline Quincy Boston Back Bay South End Beacon Hill
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofing services.

How long does a typical Boston roof replacement take?

Most residential projects in Back Bay or South End take 3-5 days depending on complexity. We coordinate with historic commissions when required and always maintain weather protection during the process.

Do you handle the permitting process?

Yes, we manage all permits including Boston's historic district approvals. Our team knows each neighborhood's requirements from Jamaica Plain to Charlestown.

What makes Boston roofs different?

Our roofs combat unique challenges: salt corrosion near the harbor, heavy snow loads, and intricate flashing needs on historic masonry. We design for these factors from the start.

Built on Boston Values

Ready to protect your home with a roofing team that treats you like family? Let's get started today.

Let's Begin →
Heritage Roof Masters

Heritage Roof Masters is a locally owned and operated roofing company proudly serving Boston and surrounding areas. We specialize in residential and commercial roofing with industry-leading certifications.
